title: descurainia incana subsp. incisa
intro: Descurainia incana subsp. incisa, also known as Hoary Whitetop or Hoary Tansy Mustard, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Descurainia incana subsp. incisa include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Descurainia incana subsp. incisa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
